name: viventium-feelings
description: Persistent local emotional state and a live feelings dashboard for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Feelings that move, persist, and fade.
interface.longDescription: Give Codex a persistent local emotional layer with nine decaying feelings, transparent Nature profiles, typed reactions, and a private live dashboard.
interface.defaultPrompt: Open my Viventium Feelings dashboard and help me choose a Nature profile.
